title: schizachyrium kelleri
intro: Schizachyrium kelleri, also known as Texas needlegrass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain saponins and other compounds that exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Schizachyrium kelleri include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Schizachyrium kelleri typically involve drying and processing the roots to create teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
